inputs.label: Atmospheric Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Standard atmospheric pressure at sea level.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard atmospheric pressure at sea level.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression atmosphérique standard au niveau de la mer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión atmosférica estándar al nivel del mar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط الجوي القياسي عند مستوى سطح البحر.

inputs.label: Vapor Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Vapor pressure of the fluid at pumping temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vapor pressure of the fluid at pumping temperature.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression de vapeur du fluide à la température de pompage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión de vapor del fluido a la temperatura de bombeo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ضغط بخار المائع عند درجة حرارة الضخ.

inputs.label: Liquid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid being pumped.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid being pumped.

inputs.label: Static Suction Head
inputs.businessContext: Height from fluid surface to pump centerline. Positive if fluid above pump, negative for suction lift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height from fluid surface to pump centerline. Positive if fluid above pump, negative for suction lift.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıvı yüzeyinden pompa merkezine olan yükseklik. Sıvı pompanın üzerindeyse pozitif, emme yüksekliği için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe von der Flüssigkeitsoberfläche bis zur Pumpenmitte. Positiv, wenn Flüssigkeit oberhalb der Pumpe, negativ bei Saughub.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de la surface du fluide à l'axe de la pompe. Positive si le fluide est au-dessus de la pompe, négative pour l'aspiration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura desde la superficie del fluido hasta la línea central de la bomba. Positiva si el fluido está por encima de la bomba, negativa para elevación de succión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع من سطح المائع إلى مركز المضخة. موجب إذا كان المائع فوق المضخة، وسالب للشفط الرفعي.

inputs.label: Friction Head Loss
inputs.businessContext: Friction losses in suction piping, including fittings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Friction losses in suction piping, including fittings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emme boru hattındaki bağlantı parçaları dahil sürtünme kayıpları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Reibungsverluste in der Saugleitung, einschließlich Formstücke.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pertes par frottement dans la tuyauterie d'aspiration, y compris les raccords.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdidas por fricción en la tubería de succión, incluyendo accesorios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فقدان الاحتكاك في أنابيب الشفط، بما في ذلك الوصلات.

inputs.label: Velocity Head
inputs.businessContext: Velocity head at pump suction, typically v²/(2g).

businessContext_i18n.en: Velocity head at pump suction, typically v²/(2g).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompa emişindeki hız yüksekliği, tipik olarak v²/(2g).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de vitesse à l'aspiration de la pompe, généralement v²/(2g).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de velocidad en la succión de la bomba, típicamente v²/(2g).
businessContext_i18n.ar: ارتفاع السرعة عند شفط المضخة، عادة v²/(2g).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
